race.comment: The scratching of I AM ADONIS opens this up. Consistent mare MAQUISA (8) continued her fine run of recent form when in the money over 1350m at Wyong last time out. Wasn't beaten far in town prior to that. Only needs to hold this performance level to be a key runner again. MISS CAPITALE (9) appreciated the small step up in trip last start when she led but just failed to hang on over 1300m at Illawarra Grange. Honest mare who will give a great sight again at her first try over today's journey. JACOB'S LADDER (4) pulled up with the thumps at Warwick Farm recently in a run to put the pen through. Best figures stack up so don't rule him out. RACH (12) wasn't far away at Wyong last time and from a good gate is a sound each-way hope. SISTER DAAE (18) loves the sting out of the ground and comes to hand quickly so she is a threat first-up from a spell.
